intro: Naegelia geroltiana, also known as Geroltsia, is a perennial plant belonging to the family Gesneriaceae. It is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a promising candidate for treating various conditions such as wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Naegelia geroltiana include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Naegelia geroltiana is often used to prepare infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat coughs, colds, and skin conditions.
